app.name: TikTok Live Event Monitor
app.one_liner: A real-time monitor for TikTok LIVE events such as comments, gifts, and user joins using only a username and no credentials.

screens.name: Live Event Dashboard
screens.purpose: Display real-time TikTok LIVE events including chat comments, gifts, and user activity.
primary_actions: Filter events by type (e.g., gift, comment, join)
Start monitoring a live stream by username
View incoming events in real time

rust_commands.name: connect_to_live
rust_commands.purpose: Initiate connection to a TikTok LIVE stream using the streamer's username to begin receiving real-time events.

rust_commands.name: fetch_room_data
rust_commands.purpose: Retrieve initial room metadata such as viewer count, stream status, and HLS URL if available.

mvp_plan: week 1: Add error handling for common connection failures (403, user_not_found)
week 1: Build basic dashboard to display incoming events
week 1: Implement core connection logic using TikTokLiveConnection wrapper
week 1: Set up event listeners for key WebcastEvent types (comment, gift, member)
acceptance_tests: Gift events from users are reliably captured and logged, even for high-frequency senders.
Initial room data (including live status and viewer count) is fetched without error on stream start.
Member join events are triggered for users with gift level 25+ in rooms with fewer than 100 viewers.
System successfully connects to a public TikTok LIVE stream using only the username and begins receiving chat comments.
